name: Taylor, MJ Hegar Finance HQ
subject: Our biggest month yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
July has been a huge month, so we're topping it off with a massive end-of-month goal.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd3d/1018664760/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd3c/1018664760/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200729.3nd__1815__&amount=10")
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd3c/1018664760/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200729.3nd__1815__&amount=10")
Peter -- Since MJ won the runoff, this grassroots team has come through in a huge way. Folks from all over Texas have stepped up to power this campaign to take on Sen. Cornyn.

I need you to know that EVERY dollar you donate gets us one step closer to defeating Sen. Cornyn, flipping Texas, _and_ booting Majority Leader Mitch McConnell in November.

The past few weeks have been our strongest yet and we've set an ambitious end-of-month goal because with just a few months until the election, we have to keep expanding our campaign! And I have some great news: **All donations will be MATCHED before Friday 's midnight deadline! So will you pitch in to help make July our biggest month yet?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5 (Becomes $10!)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd33/1018664760/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_202007229.3nd__1815__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10 (Becomes $20!)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd32/1018664760/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_202007229.3nd__1815__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25 (Becomes $50!)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd31/1018664760/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_202007229.3nd__1815__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50 (Becomes $100!)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd30/1018664760/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?express_lane=true&refcode=email_202007229.3nd__1815__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd37/1018664760/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200729.3nd__1815__")**
Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
MJ for Texas

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd3c/1018664760/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200729.3nd__1815__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd36/1018664760/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1815&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eab/7f51f7bc/4003be86/4ef7bd35/1018664760/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

Round Rock, TX 78683

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: I’ll fight for our conservative values
body:
I’m honored to be endorsed by so many conservative leaders
Peter,I'm honored to be endorsed by so many conservative leaders:President Trump, Sean Hannity, Sen. Marsha Blackburn, Sen. Tom Cotton, Donald Trump Jr. and now...**Vice President Mike Pence!** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phrlydl-fuutjhhtj-r/) Our campaign has huge momentum, but time is running out to early vote and I'm asking for your support right now. [**Find your early voting location by clicking here.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phrlydl-fuutjhhtj-y/) If you send me to the Senate, I promise you this: I will stand for Life, protect our 2nd Amendment, and defend the conservative values you and I share.I hope I've earned your support. [**Find your polling location and go vote!**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phrlydl-fuutjhhtj-j/) Best,Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phrlydl-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phrlydl-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phrlydl-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phrlydl-fuutjhhtj-u/)

Nashville, TN 37205

name: Tom Cotton
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Vice President Susan Rice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Have you seen the news? Joe Biden is leaning towards picking Susan Rice to be his running mate. And if we don't act now, you'll be waking up to newspaper headlines announcing Vice President Susan Rice.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzMwOTQS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Have you seen the news? Joe Biden is leaning towards picking Susan Rice to be his running mate. And if we don't act now, you'll be waking up to newspaper headlines announcing **Vice President Susan Rice.**

**[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzMwOTQS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
****
Do you remember Susan Rice?

She's the former Obama/Biden crony who couldn't even get a second cabinet position because she was so unpopular as UN Ambassador.

Susan Rice was involved in **almost every scandal of the Obama administration, including: **
* Illegally spying on General Michael Flynn before and during the 2016 election
* Helping set up the Russiagate Hoax that has been plaguing our country for the past 4 years
* Helping give $400 million in cash to the Iranian clerics who used it to fund terrorism worldwide
* Lying about what happened in Benghazi to try to help cover up the death of Americans to cover for Hillary Clinton
* Claiming that Bowe Bergdahl, the deserter who got captured by the Taliban and endangered hundreds of lives and our national security, "served honorably." ****

**We can 't take a chance on having Susan Rice as Vice President.**

**[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzMwOTQS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
**
That's why I'm running ads to stop Joe Biden right now. **

We need to get the word out to more Americans that Joe Biden and Susan Rice can't be trusted in the White House, or we're going to wake up to the reality of Vice President Susan Rice.

I've started a fund to stop Vice President Susan Rice from becoming a reality and I'm asking for your help. I want to put more ads out attacking Joe Biden and I need your help. **[**Will you donate whatever you can to stop Joe Biden and a Vice President Susan Rice?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzMwOTQS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

**[**Donate Now to Stop Susan Rice**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzMwOTQS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
****
****
In service,
****
****
****
Tom Cotton **
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzMwOTQS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
****
** **
****
| | | | | ** ** ** ** | Paid for by Cotton for Senate
---

2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNzMwOTQS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Unsubscribe](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=43073094&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2&spReportId=MTgwMjMwNTk3NQS2)**
** **
****
****

name: Barack Obama
subject: Opportunity, democracy, justice, and progress are all on the line, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We all have to do everything in our power to win this thing. |
---
[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b1f/4226591195/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020-headercountdown?refcode=julyheadercountdowntest&amount=25")
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.29_B2_BHOv2_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.29_B2_BHOv2_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS")
---
Peter --

I've run my last campaign.

But the things that I've fought for my entire career -- the things Joe and I fought for together -- like opportunity, democracy, justice, and progress, are all on the ballot this year.

That is why it is so important that we all do our part to step up and make sure that Joe wins this November. And let me tell you from experience - it's never easy.

So whatever you've done so far is not enough, Peter. I hold myself to that same standard. We all have to do everything in our power -- _every single day_ \-- to win this thing.

[**If you 're able, I'm going to need you to chip in today to make sure Joe's team has the resources they need to build a coalition of millions of voters who will turn out to defeat Trump this November.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.29_B2_BHOv2_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.29_B2_BHOv2_X__F1_S2_C2__nonopeners_RS")

**Yesterday, Joe set an ambitious end of month goal to raise $8 million more by Friday at midnight, so I hope you 'll give generously. Will you contribute? **
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b13/4226591195/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b12/4226591195/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b11/4226591195/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b10/4226591195/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b0f/4226591195/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b0e/4226591195/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b11/4226591195/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b0d/4226591195/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b10/4226591195/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a8/1cd0ac28/17720f951/357d1b0c/4226591195/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

But the things that I've fought for my entire career -- the things Joe and I fought for together -- like opportunity, democracy, justice, and progress, are all on the ballot this year. name: Team Manny
subject: Hagerty funding Black Lives Matter--and hiding it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdujjut-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

You thought it was bad when Bill Hagerty was caught sitting on the board of a company issuing pro-BLM statements while he was running anti-BLM ads? Well, today that story got worse. **Turns out Bill Hagerty hid his involvement in the same company - RJ O'Brien - on his March 12 Senate ethics disclosure form until two weeks ago.** He's required to list all outside positions. RJ O'Brien isn't anywhere on it. You might remember that he dramatically quit the board of RJ O'Brien AFTER we busted him for his hypocrisy. And now that he's been caught, guess what shows up on his July 10 disclosure? That's right: RJ O'Brien. _**But that's not the only disclosure the name "O'Brien" appears on.**_ The members of the O’Brien family have combined to give Hagerty’s campaign a whopping $22,400. All of those donations were made in September and October 2019. The O’Brien family owns the controlling stake in the company and have been funding ads attacking Manny Sethi. [SIGN THE PETITION: BILL HAGERTY SHOULD RETURN THESE DONATIONS](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdujjut-olhhkyhhid-j/) This isn’t some company Hagerty could have just forgotten. He was on their board from 2010-2017, then rejoined again when he quit as Ambassador. **Hagerty knows who RJ O’Brien is. He just didn’t want Tennesseans to know.** Will he return their donations now that he's been caught, just like how he resigned from the board? We’ve now caught him hiding the truth about his involvement with RJ O’Brien TWICE. It really makes you think: **what else is Bill Hagerty hiding from Tennesseans?** Sign our petition and show Bill Hagerty that you won’t let him get away with this: [https://secure.winred.com/dr-manny-for-us-senate/obrien-disclosure](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkdujjut-olhhkyhhid-t/) Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer

name: Joe Biden
subject: I'm asking if you can join me and Elizabeth Warren at Friday's virtual grassroots fundraiser
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This Friday, my good friend Elizabeth Warren and I are hosting a virtual discussion on our plan to win this November. And I'd love it if you could join this special event, because victory isn't possib | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852502d/45c30650/1cda29292/66e86ab0/2334143606/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This Friday, my good friend Elizabeth Warren and I are hosting a virtual discussion on our plan to win this November.

And I'd love it if you could join this special event, because victory isn't possible without grassroots supporters like you.

**[If you're able to, please chip in $2 or any amount to join me and Elizabeth Warren this Friday, July 31, at 7:30 p.m. ET. We'll talk about our game plan to win the White House and elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2020.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852502d/45c30650/1cda29292/66e86ab3/2334143606/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImJ2ZjIwMjBfZnJfd2FycmVuZ3Jhc3Nyb290c2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQyNkZfRU9NX0lOVl9KXzIwMjAwNzI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT26F_EOM_INV_J_20200729_V1S1_P")**

I'm counting on Elizabeth for her ideas and her leadership. I'm grateful that she's on the front lines fighting for a government that works for the people who actually built this country -- for working people, not Wall Street.

And I'm counting on you, too.

As a member of Elizabeth's team, you helped build one of the most impressive grassroots movements in the history of politics -- $5 and $10 at a time. You took on corruption. You fought big fights. And you pushed for big ideas.

Leaders like you are the spine of our campaign. I can't make it to the White House without a grassroots campaign by my side -- and that's only possible with grassroots donors.

We've got a heck of a job ahead of us. But if we work together, I know we can get it done. We can win the battle for the soul of our nation -- and start making the big, structural changes we need to make.

**I'd be honored to earn your support. And I hope I'll see you this Friday.**

[If it makes sense for you right now, please make a donation of any amount to join Friday night's special conversation with Elizabeth and me about how we'll win back the White House and transform this country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852502d/45c30650/1cda29292/66e86ab3/2334143606/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImJ2ZjIwMjBfZnJfd2FycmVuZ3Jhc3Nyb290c2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQyNkZfRU9NX0lOVl9KXzIwMjAwNzI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT26F_EOM_INV_J_20200729_V1S1_P")

Thank you,

Joe Biden

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852502d/45c30650/1cda29292/66e86ab3/2334143606/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImJ2ZjIwMjBfZnJfd2FycmVuZ3Jhc3Nyb290c2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQyNkZfRU9NX0lOVl9KXzIwMjAwNzI5X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT26F_EOM_INV_J_20200729_V1S1_P")

subject: Our Closing TV Ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/traceymann/update-6954308?e=a9d1410029)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

It's hard to believe election day is only 6 short days away. I'm writing to you to send you the final ad of the campaign and ask for your help.

The ad below proves that Kansans have a clear choice this election. I've been a Kansas Republican my whole life. I'm a conservative who wants to be the voice in DC for our conservative values and rural way of life.

I understand Bill Clifford is a tremendous eye surgeon but his public policy positions are far to the left of the values of this district. Whether it's on immigration, taxes, or spending his values do not match up with the 1st Congressional District.

So I need your help with 2 things:
1. Will you please watch this video and share it with 5 friends?
2. Will you please contribute today so we have the funds to run this ad through the end of the campaign?

---
| [ ](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=e65de02d70&e=a9d1410029)
---
| Audrey and I are humbled by your friendship, prayers, and support. With just 6 days remaining, now is the time to lean in.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: If the Democrats Win
body:
There’s still time to save America from this nightmare scenario...
There's still time to save America from this nightmare scenario... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-s/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [If the Democrats Win](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-j/)
We're a little less than 100 days from this year's election. People are saying, this could be the most important election of our lifetime. A bit cliche? Not this time. The reality is, the House, the Senate and the Presidency are all at stake. In this week's blog, I discuss what will happen if the Democrats sweep the election. God help us. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Major Threats to the US Across the Globe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this week's blog, I thought I would discuss the major challenges the United States faces across the globe. As a senior member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, I would say that the five most problematic nations are Russia, China, Iran, North Korea and Venezuela. And in a little more than three months, the American people must decide whether it's true or not - that Joe Biden has been wrong on every major foreign policy issue in recent memory. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [We're #1](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-u/)
When it comes to obtaining PPP funding to save jobs in our congressional district, as compared to Ohio's other 15 congressional districts, we are #1 in every category. In this week's blog, I discuss some of these benefits that I have fought for and secured to help you and your family during these challenging times. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The REAL Threat](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-n/)
There is no doubt that George Floyd and his family deserve justice for his senseless death. Nevertheless, this past weekend was particularly violent in our nation's urban areas. Case in point, in Chicago there were 77 shootings and 17 deaths. None of these victims was shot by a policeman. And there were no protesters in the street. No statues were torn down. No autonomous zones were set up. And the press mostly ignored it. In this week's blog, I discuss this alarming trend in our cities (Cincinnati included) and answer the question - do these victims lives matter too? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-p/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-x/)
### [Chief Justice Roberts Disappoints Again](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkdutke-kujkulhluu-m/)
This past week, Chief Justice John Roberts joined the other liberal Supreme Court judges to strike down a Louisiana pro-life law that required abortionists to have admitting privileges in a nearby hospital - another disappointing decision from a Republican appointed Justice. In this week's blog, I discuss the phenomenon of conservative judges trending left. Why do we never see liberal judges going to the right? clean_body: There’s still time to save America from this nightmare scenario... There's still time to save America from this nightmare scenario... No images? We're a little less than 100 days from this year's election. People are saying, this could be the most important election of our lifetime. A bit cliche? Not this time. The reality is, the House, the Senate and the Presidency are all at stake. In this week's blog, I discuss what will happen if the Democrats sweep the election. God help us. Previous Blog Posts In this week's blog, I thought I would discuss the major challenges the United States faces across the globe. As a senior member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee, I would say that the five most problematic nations are Russia, China, Iran, North Korea and Venezuela. And in a little more than three months, the American people must decide whether it's true or not - that Joe Biden has been wrong on every major foreign policy issue in recent memory. When it comes to obtaining PPP funding to save jobs in our congressional district, as compared to Ohio's other 15 congressional districts, we are #1 in every category. In this week's blog, I discuss some of these benefits that I have fought for and secured to help you and your family during these challenging times. There is no doubt that George Floyd and his family deserve justice for his senseless death. Nevertheless, this past weekend was particularly violent in our nation's urban areas. Case in point, in Chicago there were 77 shootings and 17 deaths. None of these victims was shot by a policeman. And there were no protesters in the street. No statues were torn down. No autonomous zones were set up. And the press mostly ignored it. In this week's blog, I discuss this alarming trend in our cities (Cincinnati included) and answer the question - do these victims lives matter too? This past week, Chief Justice John Roberts joined the other liberal Supreme Court judges to strike down a Louisiana pro-life law that required abortionists to have admitting privileges in a nearby hospital - another disappointing decision from a Republican appointed Justice. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. = Dear Friend, We had a strong start yesterday, but still need we need your help to raise an additional $4,530 before midnight tomorrow to reach our goal. = | = I moved to Central Texas fourteen years ago because I thought it would be a great place to raise a family. My opponent moved to Central Texas nine months ago to establish residency. I'm running to restore representation of the people of Central Texas to Washington and to do my small part to restore the integrity of our democratic institutions. He's running on behalf of a small handful of donors and power brokers to regain the levers of power he (and they) lost when the voters of the 32nd District fired him in 2018. His candidacy represents everything that is wrong with our system. =** If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS ---|--- = | = = | = = | = = | = Thank you, and stay safe! name: Matt Gaetz
subject: China is not our friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010wjxpr0VHu4Zw7J9D14tnM2YAcr16sTT-t-g4nmDs1EfsRBDi5kWd6xPIcK-TCHXMY8FgUAAJNbg4q-Ui1ZgPzumz2brYaprGneAW7PJ6YfozzR3WEg3IMZusM7o40hsyW2eJZmR_nQmco3nFvcUIcfHRcYH7Y8o6BamgwXQZyubeFTYwbCLIA==&c=IIQvISyUaO9E6NIUND_TCSLTrSpXgSa5ji46ZIHrwEn1RebIW2tYSA==&ch=YPEmNdRoyLuL2e_wkSS9th4lnN0Qt4vLkM-MLk_yutdakz8YYveBLA==)
---
| Patriot,
Let's be frank. The Communist Party of China is set out to destroy America. Just in the past week, the US has charged two Chinese nationals in a COVID-19 vaccine hacking scheme, along with stealing other trade secrets from us and our allies. Then the Chinese consulate in Houston was caught burning documents inside their walls and refused to let in the fire department. The consulate has been accused of harboring Chinese spies.
China has been targeting America for years, and it's time we finally take a stand.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010wjxpr0VHu4Zw7J9D14tnM2YAcr16sTT-t-g4nmDs1EfsRBDi5kWd6xPIcK-TCHXMY8FgUAAJNbg4q-Ui1ZgPzumz2brYaprGneAW7PJ6YfozzR3WEg3IMZusM7o40hsyW2eJZmR_nQmco3nFvcUIcfHRcYH7Y8o6BamgwXQZyubeFTYwbCLIA==&c=IIQvISyUaO9E6NIUND_TCSLTrSpXgSa5ji46ZIHrwEn1RebIW2tYSA==&ch=YPEmNdRoyLuL2e_wkSS9th4lnN0Qt4vLkM-MLk_yutdakz8YYveBLA==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010wjxpr0VHu4Zw7J9D14tnM2YAcr16sTT-t-g4nmDs1EfsRBDi5kWd6xPIcK-TCHXMY8FgUAAJNbg4q-Ui1ZgPzumz2brYaprGneAW7PJ6YfozzR3WEg3IMZusM7o40hsyW2eJZmR_nQmco3nFvcUIcfHRcYH7Y8o6BamgwXQZyubeFTYwbCLIA==&c=IIQvISyUaO9E6NIUND_TCSLTrSpXgSa5ji46ZIHrwEn1RebIW2tYSA==&ch=YPEmNdRoyLuL2e_wkSS9th4lnN0Qt4vLkM-MLk_yutdakz8YYveBLA==)
---
| The Democrats have refused to call out China for their crimes against the world, and globalist "Republicans" turn a blind eye. But I will not back down in the fight for what is right.
Will you join me in taking on the Communist Party of China? The future of our country could depend on it...
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT. STAND UP TO CHINA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010wjxpr0VHu4Zw7J9D14tnM2YAcr16sTT-t-g4nmDs1EfsRBDi5kWd6xPIcK-TCHXMY8FgUAAJNbg4q-Ui1ZgPzumz2brYaprGneAW7PJ6YfozzR3WEg3IMZusM7o40hsyW2eJZmR_nQmco3nFvcUIcfHRcYH7Y8o6BamgwXQZyubeFTYwbCLIA==&c=IIQvISyUaO9E6NIUND_TCSLTrSpXgSa5ji46ZIHrwEn1RebIW2tYSA==&ch=YPEmNdRoyLuL2e_wkSS9th4lnN0Qt4vLkM-MLk_yutdakz8YYveBLA==)
---
| I am going to need your support to take on a powerful nation like China. And without the backing of many of my colleagues in Congress, it will be an uphill battle in every sense of the phrase. Can you chip in to show me that American Patriots across the country have had enough of the Communist Party of China?
---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW AND JOIN THE FIGHT AGAINST CHINA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010wjxpr0VHu4Zw7J9D14tnM2YAcr16sTT-t-g4nmDs1EfsRBDi5kWd6xPIcK-TCHXMY8FgUAAJNbg4q-Ui1ZgPzumz2brYaprGneAW7PJ6YfozzR3WEg3IMZusM7o40hsyW2eJZmR_nQmco3nFvcUIcfHRcYH7Y8o6BamgwXQZyubeFTYwbCLIA==&c=IIQvISyUaO9E6NIUND_TCSLTrSpXgSa5ji46ZIHrwEn1RebIW2tYSA==&ch=YPEmNdRoyLuL2e_wkSS9th4lnN0Qt4vLkM-MLk_yutdakz8YYveBLA==)

We’re coming down to the wire as we approach the end of the month, and we’re just short of reaching our $20,000 online fundraising goal — but there’s still time to contribute before tomorrow’s deadline.

Thank you for being a part of our campaign to bring change to Washington,
— Team Amy

But after our incredible upset victory in New Jersey’s primary, we’re starting from scratch. We need to close the fundraising gap, and we’re counting on grassroots support to do it. Will you pitch in $10 or more before tomorrow’s deadline to help send Amy to Congress? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Amy is running for Congress to fight for the issues that matter to all of us, from expanding affordable health care to making sure families get the support they need in the middle of the worst economic and public health crises in generations. That’s a lot better than what we’re getting from Washington right now. Thank you for being a part of our campaign to bring change to Washington, — Team Amy P.S. Please take care of yourself and family first and only contribute if it makes sense for you. If you would like to receive fewer fundraising emails,. Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress Amy Kennedy for Congress P.O. Box 247 Brigantine, NJ 08203 United States

subject: McConnell's majority is slipping away, and the GOP is panicking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
But we're falling behind on our fundraising goal. |
---
Friend, Mitch McConnell's Senate majority is slipping away.

We know it. He knows it.

**Control of the Senate is going to come down to Georgia, and Mitch McConnell sees that Jon Ossoff is neck and neck with GOP Sen. David Perdue in the polls.**

**So McConnell is unloading his dark money donor network to save Perdue's seat and his Republican majority.**

_The GOP has already committed $25 million to stop Jon. McConnell's super PACs and the Trump family won't hesitate to spend tens of millions more._

Friend, our campaign isn't taking contributions from corporate PACs or Congressional lobbyists.

To compete with the GOP dark money machine, we need an outpouring of small-dollar grassroots support from people like you.

**We need to hit $100,000 in grassroots support by 11:59 PM tomorrow to keep pace, and we are falling behind!**

**[Right now, can you chip in ANY AMOUNT so we can hit our end-of-July goal to stay on track to elect Jon and end Mitch McConnell's grip on the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21ce/5b2c1286/3e1be4a5/25f117b4/1813706729/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_30_grassroots_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_30_grassroots_eom")**

clean_body: | Hey, It's the other Mike Espy again. My apologies if that is confusing. I promise one day that I will explain how we both go by the name Mike Espy, though neither of us are a Jr. or Sr. But right now we have more important issues to discuss. Our campaign is approaching our end-of-month fundraising deadline and we need your help. = The team has been working tirelessly to share my dad’s vision for a new Mississippi and connect with supporters throughout July. We launched a new ad that shared how my dad and aunt integrated their high school. We kicked off our Moving Mississippi Forward tour (I hosted the kick-off event). And last weekend, my dad was on MSNBC talking about the campaign and how we are building something special in Mississippi. Our team has amazing momentum right now, and we’re in the perfect position to make July a huge success. We just need a little extra push, and I'm confident we will be able to achieve our goals for this month. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We accomplished so many amazing things this month because of supporters like you pitching in and helping out. The campaign is full of energy right now and we are just getting started. Stayed tuned for more amazing things coming your way (I may be emailing you about me and my dad’s tricky name situation soon.) Thanks for all you do, Mike Espy Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: SNEAK PEAK - End Walz Power Commercial
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=1)
---
Peter -- Thanks to the support and work of our supporters, we've been able to gain momentum on every vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers at the Capitol. **Here's a recap...**
* **April 14 - only 15 Republicans voted with us**
* **April 28 - after weeks of pressuring House Republicans, we got all 59 to vote with us**
* **June 13 - after pressuring the Senate Republicans, we got them to pass the Resolution and we got 61 votes in the House with 2 Democrats**
* **July 14 - we got 63 votes in the House with 4 Democrats joining us**

Remember, we need 68 votes on the Resolution in the Minnesota House to finally End Walz' Powers. **So, we're merely FIVE DEMOCRATS AWAY from ending Walz' emergency powers once and for all!** So I want to give you a sneak peak of the commercial we'll be launching in several districts throughout Minnesota, targeting vulnerable Democrats. It's time to **turn up the heat**! [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=2) Walz has completely abused his emergency powers to infringe on our civil liberties and shut down our favorite businesses. Now he's forcing YOU to wear a mask. And later today, he's likely to do the Teacher's Union a favor and keep our schools closed this fall. **Governor Walz is power hungry. Allowing one person to make rules that govern free people is the most un-American ideal that exists. He MUST BE STOPPED!**
## [HELP US TURN UP THE HEAT](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=3)
The Legislature will be back in session in two weeks and we're ready to **turn up the heat** on the remaining Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. We have a shot at finally stopping Walz in his tracks!
### **Action 4 Liberty is going to run commercials like this one of Rep Jeff Brand PLUS six other districts of Democrats who are most vulnerable in the November election.**
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_brand_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=4) Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters in these districts by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=5 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=6)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on these Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Who knows what next week has in store for our suffering state under Walz' failed leadership.
[**Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=7)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_commercial&n=10), software for leaders.

Peter,
I’d like to ask for your help – we are $5,080 away from July’s fundraising goal and the clock runs out at midnight tomorrow. We’ve pushed our fundraising goals more than ever before this year and I think you know why.
Donald Trump and the Republican party have done more damage to this country in the past 4 years than we ever thought possible. From an absolute failure in handling the Covid-19 crisis, to voter suppression, to racist and violent extremism – things have gotten worse and it’s time for a change. And right now, that means electing Democrats.
From our digital program (DIGTHORP2020) to our voter protection program, the TNDP staff have been on the front lines like never before. They are working hard, doing everything they can to support Tennessee Democrats and Democratic candidates. Can you help support them by making a donation right now? Your support means everything. | Friend --

Following up on his personal endorsement last month, Pete Buttigieg’s _Win the Era_ PAC has endorsed Pat! In endorsing Pat, Mayor Pete had this to say:

> _I'm ready for Pat Hackett to be my Representative in Congress. Her campaign message of Dignity and Justice for All represents the change we need to better serve South Bend and everyone in Indiana's Second Congressional District. She's spent her entire career serving our community and getting things done with people of every background--and I know she will put that same spirit to work in Congress._
[**Pete’s historic presidential campaign confirmed that the higher values of optimism, courage, and hope that we ascribe to as Americans unify us a nation. With those ideals in mind, we are marching forward to victory in November.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=2c282be912&e=5886ca081d)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Sign on and support Vote by Mail across America!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
_You are receiving this email because you are a top supporter of Democrats in Virginia. If you feel you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe at the bottom of this email._ Derek,
The right to vote is fundamental to who we are as Americans. That’s why my proudest moment as Virginia’s Governor was restoring voting rights to a record number of Virginians who had lost the right to vote when they were convicted of a felony. I simply couldn’t let hundreds of thousands of Virginians, who were mostly Black, to be disenfranchised after doing their time and paying back their debt to society. Democrats stand up for the right to vote and I’m proud of that. With COVID-19 still raging throughout the country, in 2020 our fight to expand access to the ballot box is more important than ever. **** **[Can you sign on and join me in urging Congress to pass a national vote by mail option?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXifARUXl56T-CYnCqxOgDmGvBosPO-izhihzylGYa1d3SCkdnLeagVKPFoYyscdx5-23jLN0lkXTdjWl1KNQp3BWKHIaxDlAadhev8ahp2Qpmk7YFvBmZtjkZvwpe57ad4AIust-jg4wWdyRj2MOetVsiI7oqclUbMvSql_xwp1lTKfDuuJZEY2GKU1-23oDAs3FsGgtpPl0_qc9QffzHGozGAIxmWqeb8kkWpaZMeAqh5i5_n4ePhiuR7hegewide5X13EyW7-Fi7ByPhs2MyXooEt6tz_9jl8xkki-rTdwK2Lx9aKhk_u37DA2wJedKT7PPl8JhAkI7rQEtBatVSB_g/33w/TIGRXkqOTTKbVQJMwcIcIQ/h0/je3PKNOATqAM_sAQx9R1cEK7FaOYilfRfHaYIo5rML4)** In the Commonwealth, we’re lucky that the General Assembly has already expanded ballot access, including ways to make it easier to vote by mail. Unfortunately, far too many states don’t have it as good. Even though we’re in the middle of a deadly pandemic, Republicans are fighting Democratic efforts to make voting safer and more accessible. Donald Trump seems particularly unhinged. His lying about voting by mail is so blatant, Twitter decided to include fact checks on his tweets in order to correct the record. For far too long Republicans have worked to suppress access to the ballot box. 2020 is the most important election in a generation and we can’t let them get away with it again. **[Please, add your name right now and join me in supporting a national vote by mail option. Voting is a fundamental American right and I can’t thank you enough for your support.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnBkCvBzmfhJhusTxRCyXifARUXl56T-CYnCqxOgDmGvBosPO-izhihzylGYa1d3SCkdnLeagVKPFoYyscdx5-26hAm3NAfb1qpkIt2d1NpBpHBhPJ5WnbpWudi0LrtazCfYwlb0OogyfGJ0Z1llxZu3GaxUMRnI703YWl4fMqEQ0O86AvMLJIJOoPnIQ5ClWbPoRvsSNcddqkXxR0VUYTVUF0H2VT9MjURT-EfptW3lnBu5Ay5TasQnZw6mz_cAmGqke-yDxmFUjQSBW66crji4n_552ACkVRsR-zITCArbyZ3tlY6s0aCywK5xz159ov67LBgOe8xoN_nimWMu3916HqaDJhj0H32QLxba_Shcw/33w/TIGRXkqOTTKbVQJMwcIcIQ/h1/MHYJZUp4B9cIg4Hw7X17aJc0iDNocvF8Ovs2Mepmxh0)** -Terry
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miMlYzrDTXorh54W6kP4vaL6mBQADGu-1nnfHE9h9A6JDRWFGiTYIBaAX5ZXkuRsvtNPRrWDDuKNBVeyTW-8--pLtFPsSUfb4jAYjX9EFHI7FXsHsP9qoVUn91_mbGTosghUy4k8MEqfiLQPlA8GZuDYDtV4v-mUt8M0gQKbNS14zekF450LW3AtxI_qESBXDh1qRADpvRY7nnRhcwrPVuFyufuDVHprvgXrVniQ9r7Z50DzH2ferct6S4CFN0Av4k3POj7xpQmCfxUTObREJ3YGJpV9YzOy00Nt3Mpinfm1JMnPoBbdNPFXasEWqxUq6KWUGvCvjHEy5mfMcJtvDSs47GqduYxUnvC4lrnQQL8gE/33w/TIGRXkqOTTKbVQJMwcIcIQ/h2/y5p4RrbBbhQsEVHW_Cbi2Rti1SzO5lQCPXU3tZPJ0d0)

body:
The end of July is coming up fast.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb5/7f51f7bc/40061440/4ef7bd5e/198272206/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hi Peter,

The past few weeks have been the strongest of our campaign, and I am so grateful for the outpouring of support since we won the runoff! It's clear: Texas is fired up and ready to elect a senator who will always put working families over DC special interests, who won't take a penny of corporate PAC money, and who answers to the _people_ \-- not Big Pharma, the gun lobby, or the Koch network.

Instead, I'm counting on the support of people just like you to win in November. This race is going to be _close_. Right now we've got extraordinary momentum on our side, so we can't slow down for a second. That's why we've set a huge July goal. **[Can I count on you to make a matched donation before our Friday deadline?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb5/7f51f7bc/40061440/4ef7bd5d/198272206/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200730.1nd__1817__&amount=10")**

We've got a Texas-sized grassroots army powering this campaign, with over 56,000 donors from more than 190 Texas counties, and our average online donation is just $23! This is truly a movement powered by the people. Meanwhile, Sen. Cornyn has millions of dollars from all the special interests banking on keeping their yes-man in the Senate.

I know we can defeat him with adequate resources -- the polls prove it! So if you're in a position to make a donation of even $1, **[I really need you to step up before tomorrow's midnight deadline!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb5/7f51f7bc/40061440/4ef7bd5d/198272206/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200730.1nd__1817__&amount=10")**

Together, we can defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate on November 3rd. | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

[**Pete’s historic presidential campaign confirmed that the higher values of optimism, courage, and hope that we ascribe to as Americans unify us a nation. subject: Your supporter record, as of today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We can't win this without you. |
---
Hi there,

It's Ellen, Jon Ossoff's Campaign Manager.

This campaign is surging in the polls, but we need to keep up that momentum in fundraising, too -- especially with our critical end-of-month deadline _tomorrow night_ and all this outside GOP money flooding into Georgia.

**Just now, I took a look at your supporter record, and I noticed you haven't made a donation to Jon's Senate campaign yet.**

**I wanted to reach out to you directly to ask if you'd be willing to[chip in $10 today](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21d4/5b2c1286/3e1e788d/25f1170c/1461054501/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_30_rec_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_30_rec_eom&amount=10") to help us reach our fundraising goal for the end of July.**
**Grassroots Supporter:** Prospective 2020 donor
**Donated to Ossoff for Senate?** Not yet!
**Suggested action:[First $10 donation](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21d4/5b2c1286/3e1e788d/25f1170c/1461054501/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_30_rec_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_30_rec_eom&amount=10")**
We are a grassroots campaign powered by small-dollar donations -- our average donation in the second quarter of 2020 was just $20!

_And we're up against a Republican machine spending TENS of MILLIONS of dollars of dark money to defeat Jon._

Every dollar matters. Honestly, we can't win this without you.

**[Will you make your first $10 donation before the end of the month to elect Jon Ossoff and turn the Senate blue?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21d4/5b2c1286/3e1e788d/25f1170c/1461054501/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_30_rec_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_30_rec_eom&amount=10")**

name: Nick
subject: take a stand for freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:

name: Joe Biden
subject: Elizabeth Warren and I are excited to chat with you tomorrow, Peter
body:
Chip in today to RSVP to our virtual grassroots fundraiser if you haven't already! |
---
Peter --

One thing Elizabeth Warren and I have always had in common is that grassroots donors have always been a central part of our campaigns. It was true when each of us ran for Senate, and we both know how critical grassroots supporters are when running for President.

Month after month, grassroots donations from supporters like you have made up nearly all of my campaign's contributions. Peter, I'm so proud of that.

And now, I'm excited to invite you to join my friend Elizabeth and me for a grassroots fundraiser, where we'll talk about what's at stake in this election and answer questions from supporters like you.

[Make sure to read Elizabeth's note below, and chip in today to RSVP to our virtual grassroots fundraiser if you haven't already! I can't wait to see you this Friday, July 31, at 7:30 EDT. A donation of any amount will get you a ticket to the event, but I hope you'll consider chipping in $5 or more.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Elizabeth and I know what's at stake in this election. We are in a battle for the soul of our nation, and I'm so honored to have Senator Warren's support, and the support of everyone else in this fight with us.

Peter, we're counting on you, your vote, your voice, and your grassroots support to make sure we win this fight and beat Donald Trump and Republicans in November.

That's why we're holding this grassroots fundraiser. That's why I'm asking if you'll donate through those buttons above or the link I'm going to put below -- any amount, I mean it.

**Once you do, my team will follow up with your special link to access the fundraiser and a form where you can submit questions to ask Senator Warren and me:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/Elizabeth-Warren-Grassroots-Fundraiser](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1")

Thank you, Peter. Elizabeth and I can't wait to see you tomorrow! And if you have a chance before then, I hope you'll read Senator Warren's email below.

\- Joe

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Elizabeth Warren
Date: Mon, July 29, 2020
Subject: Inviting you to a grassroots fundraiser with me and Joe Biden
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1")
Peter --

Beating Donald Trump and Republicans up and down the ballot is going to be an uphill fight for each of these next 99 days, but I'm ready to run up that hill, and so is Joe --- and Peter, I hope you are, too.

This is our moment. Our moment to restore the soul of our nation. Our moment to build back our economy and our government better than ever before.

But we can only make the change our country desperately needs if we fight for it, together. We need you in this fight, Peter. **That 's why I'm very glad to announce that I'll be joining my friend Joe Biden for a virtual grassroots fundraiser this Friday, July 31, at 7:30 pm eastern!**

[We'll be answering your questions and talking with grassroots supporters like you, Peter. So I hope you'll chip in whatever you can today as your RSVP to this exciting event.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1")

Peter, this country can't afford four more years of Donald Trump's failed leadership. And once we beat him and Republicans across the country in November, we're going to have to rebuild so many parts of our country, and we'll have to build them back better than they were before.

But understand this: we can't win in November without a grassroots movement. That's why grassroots fundraisers like this are critical, and why I'm honored to speak with Joe, you, and so many other people who are a part of this grassroots campaign.

So, Peter, can you chip in today and RSVP to Friday's grassroots fundraiser? There is so much at stake -- and whatever you are able to contribute today will make a powerfully important difference in November.

**Peter, will you make your first donation today and reserve your spot at my grassroots fundraiser with Joe?**

[https://go.joebiden.com/Elizabeth-Warren-Grassroots-Fundraiser](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.30_B1_JB-EW-GRFR_X__F1_S2_C1__full_T1")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a1/1cd0ac28/17769617e/357d19b7/2946216527/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9a1/1cd0ac28/17769617e/357d19b8/2946216527/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Let's slow things down for a second
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
What this is all about:
|
---

| | There are only 96 days left until Election Day. November will be here before we know it and with the end-of-month deadline coming up tomorrow, I know things are moving fast. I want to take a moment to reflect on why I got into this race in the first place. I've lived in North Carolina's 6th District for more than 30 years. I raised my children here. I have worked as an immigration attorney and a community leader, bringing people together to solve the big problems facing our communities, like being able to afford food, mortgages, and college. **I've seen firsthand the issues North Carolinians face every day.** For instance, when my daughter was diagnosed with a chronic illness, our insurance told us we had to pay $10,000 a month for the medication she needed. Now every time I share my family's story, I hear similar experiences, like a woman from Winston-Salem who told me the medication she needs to stay alive costs $2,100 a month - and she struggles each month to figure out how to afford that medication. I know North Carolina families can't go on like that, so I decided to do something about it. [_**I 've spent 30 years making my community a better place, and now, I want to continue those efforts on a bigger scale in Congress. But I can't do it without grassroots supporters like you. So today, I'm asking you to chip in to support our campaign for NC-06 before the end-of-month deadline if you're able.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2e1/3d199a51/2f51ec22/7364a056/3512283097/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDczMGVvbV9hbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200730eom_am?refcode=kme200730eom_am_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2e1/3d199a51/2f51ec22/7364a056/3512283097/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDczMGVvbV9hbSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200730eom_am?refcode=kme200730eom_am_m_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Tracy Newman
subject: Democratic governors are being outraised by Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Republicans hope you'll sit this one out.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR) Friend, I spend most of my day looking at fundraising numbers -- and I'm nervous. While Democrats are excited to donate to federal races up and down the ballot -- Senate, House, and, of course, the White House -- Democratic governors like Jay are being left behind. The Republican Governors Association is outraising the Democratic Governors Association quarter after quarter, and I'm afraid we're going to fall behind on our fundraising goals when we need to be most prepared. You've seen the ads targeting Jay, you've seen the attacks from Donald Trump and his GOP allies, and you know this won't stop. That's why we can't fall short of our $75,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, and right now, we are. **[We're less than $25,000 away from hitting our goal, but to close the gap, we need folks like you to step up right now. Will you donate $5 or more to support Jay and his leadership right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10144?t=4&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10145?t=5&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10146?t=6&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10147?t=7&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10148?t=8&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10149?t=9&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10144?t=10&akid=8110%2E868730%2ER470JR)
---
The COVID-19 pandemic has proven just how important state leadership is -- and we can't afford to lose sight of that right now. Republicans are hoping you aren't paying attention, but your donation shows you're invested in the steady, moral leadership states like Washington need and deserve.
Thanks,
Tracy
Tracy Newman
Senior Advisor
Inslee for Washington

To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=03cdf8e7a76248abb8e21621de6a6140&_e=OfMh5-BMDmEJLt0bKuV3j5_K8xgQfmIS0sqY4yP5xljk8GeW6nZh1YBm9hwjKPwPZ4djjbuerWzXB_ZMKfZ6LW5-xRyKmNUZuti4Qcf65YApgI4W-IPwuhrIQALEC1rkgYvu2m2DNGO7Xs_niari5Hgm_b00Kpxy4cUP_vKc8FGfiRrJG-QGVSKIxfQQfq1GBRby2uDdFXTchmS1IDNkm0UvCDr1x8DF9eLIAng9ZFOpULg30ByaWsXh5xZLt_1pp_nL7Rs5OfIscUZE7ArpnYnC50haK3iCB4IYf7LLyh0ATHOxm_NGsUuYp6HFWSVREkV00Ygx-3C2IixxEZWTNaUvlN27MtCZhGCzmA4KJE7eXjIKH8GcSxZ3lIfNcpoaMieESkel3VB7GWk71ytvoOSwEblZPvH0w9VVOH96wXaTSKrJg6pGT17lwV6JkP0RZOjFby8cFFFlqOXe_1aMDynC0AAosYl8Hm-AQITI4sE%3D)** | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=03cdf8e7a76248abb8e21621de6a6140&_e=OfMh5-BMDmEJLt0bKuV3j5_K8xgQfmIS0sqY4yP5xljk8GeW6nZh1YBm9hwjKPwPZ4djjbuerWzXB_ZMKfZ6LW5-xRyKmNUZuti4Qcf65YApgI4W-IPwuhrIQALEC1rkgYvu2m2DNGO7Xs_niari5Hgm_b00Kpxy4cUP_vKc8FGfiRrJG-QGVSKIxfQQfq1GBRby2uDdFXTchmS1IDNkm0UvCDr1x8DF9eLIAng9ZFOpULg30ByaWsXh5xZLt_1pp_nL7Rs5OfIscUZE7ArpnTGwwo_9UBsXdDqtWgMeM7MdX17XKxv03_iwlE184OxHSrzwQRz3lE4JdDkuP1LSbT6_f-5r84EEKnDqA7grPzqrsLyTE4d2MFeJP_nMhfiQsxx6ILGPjzvWBXDmANKopPKPVo_nHp-b7E9wc3icfRDtMDIoWSpG3AkfJCZTSGjr8nZe6knP52hjTiKnLIgXt0vJvR9l-TBsy50S95iJ11s%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

**We’re officially in the final sprint to Election Day 2020. **

There are now fewer than 100 days left until November 3rd (we know, we can’t believe it either).

That means there are going to be a lot of late nights and early mornings for our crew between now and Election Day, but friend, — we’re fired up for the final sprint.

**_We’re ready to go, but we can’t do this alone. We need to know that you’re 100% in._**
[**Become one of 100 Hoosiers who help us build One Indiana —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=03cdf8e7a76248abb8e21621de6a6140&_e=OfMh5-BMDmEJLt0bKuV3j5_K8xgQfmIS0sqY4yP5xljk8GeW6nZh1YBm9hwjKPwPZ4djjbuerWzXB_ZMKfZ6LW5-xRyKmNUZuti4Qcf65YApgI4W-IPwuhrIQALEC1rkgYvu2m2DNGO7Xs_niari5Hgm_b00Kpxy4cUP_vKc8FGfiRrJG-QGVSKIxfQQfq1GBRby2uDdFXTchmS1IDNkm0UvCDr1x8DF9eLIAng9ZFOpULg30ByaWsXh5xZLt_1pp_nL7Rs5OfIscUZE7Arpne7b3nPXFDKKBoz6teLciY8dBpIX63JwZqLvSMMNJRSoysS_xCfkEYXMdsLVzp2O9DRRLa94T_EDoifvHLO97U2PjWW2OsUtOhyEgbSXj540MNgGyvp-iB4ugKmTewqHVuBzR8552WeslNZM-CRnL8-5Nxi4AEC-BAUBbSpIAAIk3cwIK9kAfPFGhYhyi61Lcm-wq7umpJ0wIYobJ5-blIM%3D)
_**That’s why we set a goal of 100 individual donors between now and midnight on July 31. **_

Friend, Indiana needs four more years of Eric’s experience and strong leadership.

_Four more years means better schools and more workforce training programs. Four more years means a stronger economy built to set more records again. Four more years means better roads and bridges (and finishing I-69!). _

Eric is locked in. He’s focused on the health of Hoosiers, and building One Indiana that works for Hoosiers from every walk of life. But he can’t do it alone, and he needs to know that he has the support of Hoosiers like you from every corner of our state.

If you believe in his mission to build One Indiana for every Hoosier and you want to help us reach our end of month goal, please chip in any amount below.
[**Become one of 100 Hoosiers who help us build One Indiana —>**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=03cdf8e7a76248abb8e21621de6a6140&_e=OfMh5-BMDmEJLt0bKuV3j5_K8xgQfmIS0sqY4yP5xljk8GeW6nZh1YBm9hwjKPwPZ4djjbuerWzXB_ZMKfZ6LW5-xRyKmNUZuti4Qcf65YApgI4W-IPwuhrIQALEC1rkgYvu2m2DNGO7Xs_niari5Hgm_b00Kpxy4cUP_vKc8FGfiRrJG-QGVSKIxfQQfq1GBRby2uDdFXTchmS1IDNkm0UvCDr1x8DF9eLIAng9ZFOpULg30ByaWsXh5xZLt_1pp_nL7Rs5OfIscUZE7ArpnZLhUhhSCwbdfqUkj6tieUiOmWhOHQZWXAhmlbJuWBYPsYeDl6c2N85xHD2Bq0gN_LSxL8humX4Y_FvmhLe3YJ_aQNkNrYaQtH_A_RZ-v8KDM-Tt5LCqMPSc7AqloRX1eE5AQ_jyU9HHN6RSY3_aCdzCHMG_0kYKFOELpl5kTvNeInrrjhT_7N8N77ggPneWaVjpi5TBr8WJDUYJfnD34yI%3D)
Thank you for your support,

Holcomb Crew

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: First Lady: ‘Be Best’ is Advocating that Every Child Find a Loving, Safe and Forever Family
body:
America’s kids need us now more than ever. We are doing all we can to establish solutions that best serve our children in the welfare system. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e7eb39443&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **First Lady: ‘Be Best’ is Advocating that Every Child Find a Loving, Safe and Forever Family**

“America’s kids need us now more than ever,” First Lady Melania Trump writes.

“The disruptions caused by the COVID-19 pandemic have had a serious impact on America’s children and those who care for them, from parents and teachers to child welfare workers and foster families . . . We are doing all we can to establish commonsense solutions that best serve our children in the welfare system.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3d60f2afa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Millions of people will continue to have access to affordable short-term health plans . . . [after a] three-judge panel of the court upheld by a 2-1 margin a Trump administration rule extending the maximum duration of a short-term plan to just under a year,” healthcare expert Sally Pipes writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f5c922b03&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The biggest, most sophisticated Mars rover ever built—a car-size vehicle bristling with cameras, microphones, drills and lasers—blasted off for the red planet Thursday . . .
The mission will yield lessons that could pave the way for the arrival of astronauts as early as the 2030s,” Marcia Dunn reports for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d6510d0e77&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “While other countries talk about improving environmental indicators, the United States is doing it. In fact, we have done more to help the environment and economy during the first three and a half years of the Trump administration than the Obama administration did in eight years,” EPA Administrator Andrew Wheeler writes in [_Newsweek_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57bd08d625&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59eac8f2d9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=926119c857&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c5443ecae8)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

From: MondaireforCongress.com Subj: We’re short of our goal
Friend,
It’s been over a month since our decisive victory on June 23rd, and now that we're the certified winner of the Democratic Primary, we need to win the general election against our far-right Republican opponent.
Throughout this campaign, we’ve built a grassroots movement powered by thousands of supporters who knew, well before June 23rd, that Mondaire is the best candidate to represent New York’s 17th Congressional District.
We made it across the finish line on June 23rd because of supporters like you. Even though Mondaire has been busy engaging with community leaders and speaking with local and national media about his policy proposals for the new Congress, we can’t afford to stop fundraising. **_[In fact, we’re still $17,238 away from where we need to be by the end of July. Can you chip in today to help?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w56cQ-QIZ8GdUFU1lvvgzaqRsSs-t3nS1iz7RVyv4zjdp-9hRnJ4QTvRYFxmAhrshSUHdXOHyJxHl_WtqoczQp8rvIEdjZr2kggMLhV07GI5g-b_NGthPZUUnDxXfKxwdHUgXBTT5M_8kfdcR1cr3QfO5xd1byDHLDmtYUoCeVdCDM5Lg6Us6P_3rXv6y0_7vD6rSxRk0sJ4fi6x3-VTjgcXcP5VXqByDlAkPmgkWyI2Uk5Bv-KFU9UtI-z8sjP_QOD1ABjCVnCAtKHliemvfns8IXs2chA_N8VtQHmfxg831Im7pu2CYwphBCPcrXVeA/33w/Fy7fyh3iSGG10P40aKPaSA/h4/HGNFwTpIe-VQzFK0v6NPQLwG7AknTOKC-cuhB6FL0_c)_**

We also need to send a strong message to the Republican Party that this seat will remain Democratic for many years to come. **_[Can you donate today to ensure our victory?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w56cQ-QIZ8GdUFU1lvvgzaqRsSs-t3nS1iz7RVyv4zjZQgSb56mP86trMizYgQ77XzOFv6q4w3dr6dKr31-dYWi_GqSB9l8f4lRVValkvshnp3tAKGBZ3MIghTZaSHKzkRW-IwDZgfZThUqYHBIBYQtZT-AS2kgNfIy6iClPzs-ut2VwAaVofeU5LshQpR3nfVxjWc70yrJ7ulTftm1nadbDtWZtRXl_1kkqbMDuHxEBK1LawikERdFM8cHU5B0PIcAIaywvTrjtWzRHzkqFpZgIc1epm1kK3spnzkkrv2ZhZIfC3NwdphTj01KQQN-iw/33w/Fy7fyh3iSGG10P40aKPaSA/h5/zhyyIvh5oWh25BCh4PVhfsGF_2XdiQgtgErdCIYaYTI)_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mara=20Mellstrom=2C=20Campaign=20Manager?=
subject: campaign finance report for you
body:
It’s Mara Mellstrom — I’m the campaign manager here on Team Mace. I know it seems crazy, but there are less than 100 days left before Election Day... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/fbfac524773e/how-we-flip-the-house-2088250?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=af9f85af40&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=d0b9c8cd10&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friends,

It’s Mara Mellstrom — I’m the campaign manager here on Team Mace.
I know it seems crazy, but there are less than 100 days left before Election Day 2020.

Because you’re one of the most dedicated members of our grassroots community, I wanted to reach out to you and give you a personal break down of where we stand right now.

We’re closing the fundraising gap, but we still have a ways to go to match our opponent. Here’s where we stood after the second quarter:
_Nancy Mace for Congress_

**Raised in Q2: $714,000
Total raised: $1.9 million** _Our Progressive Opponent_ **Raised in Q2: $862,000
Total raised: $4.4 million**
---
| [Help us close the fundraising gap](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e09a3a8602&e=f1831b4ca2 "Help us close the fundraising gap")
---
| Our opponent is outspending us and it hasn’t helped him one bit. We’re chasing him down in the polls, and we have more momentum than ever — that’s why Vice President Pence stopped by the Lowcountry last week.

He knows that our race is one of the best chances for Republicans to pick up a seat in 2020, and he knows that conservatives need leaders like Nancy in Congress more than ever.

Here’s where we stand right now: we set a goal of 100 individual donors before midnight on July 31 to help us close the fundraising gap, and we haven’t reached it yet.

That’s why I’m reaching out right now — will you use the link below to help us catch our opponent? We’re counting on you.

[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-2088250//july-deadline/100 donors/](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5a846359a8&e=f1831b4ca2)

Thank you for your support,

Mara Mellstrom

Campaign Manager, Mace for Congress
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20GOP?=
subject: Calling on all Hoosiers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
We need all Hoosiers to stand up and chip in to win big in this battleground race in Indiana. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469563?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

Can you imagine what will happen if we don’t win in Indiana’s 5th district?

The seat is open this election cycle, and some national pundits are calling it a battleground race.

We have a strong, conservative candidate running, and she needs our help! Will you chip in what you can now to ensure victory for Victoria Spartz?

Donate for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

In today’s world of uncertainty, we need a Republican Congress who will work with President Trump to get our economy rolling full-speed-ahead again.

The Democrats are determined to defund the police, confiscate guns, provide abortion on demand, and more! It sounds crazy, but the liberals have gone so far to the left that their vision for America isn’t even recognizable.

We have to get Nancy Pelosi out of the Speaker’s Office and it starts with winning in the 5^th District.

Donate for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

It’s going to be a disaster if Speaker Pelosi is in charge for another term, especially at a time like this.

We’re building a special list of Hoosier supporters who step up and help us in the 5th District in 2020. This could be a turning point, and we want you to have a chance to be remembered on our donor wall.

https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Winning this seat is going to go a long way toward winning back our majority in the U.S. House and firing Speaker Pelosi. Can we count on you to chip in?

Donate $5 NOW & add your name to the wall! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=5&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $10 NOW & add your name to the wall! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=10&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $50 NOW & add your name to the wall! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=50&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $100 NOW & add your name to the wall! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=100&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $250 NOW & add your name to the wall! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-2-072420?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Calling_on_all_Hoosiers__&amount=250&mc_cid=57b95d2c3d&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
